title: Leadership + People Management
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical leadership + people management habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Leadership + People Management helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn leadership + people management into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Learn the role of leadership in management, Leadership/Management, and Effective Leadership Skills so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Learn the role of leadership in management
People Management and Working with others

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
